mapper.sql: NOTE.NOTE_ID AS noteId , NR.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AS noteTrnsmitId , NR.NOTE_RECPTN_ID AS noteRecptnId , NT.TRNSMITER_ID AS frstRegisterId , NOTE.NOTE_SJ AS noteSj , NOTE.NOTE_CN AS noteCn , NR.RCVER_ID AS rcverId , NR.OPEN_YN AS openYn , NR.RECPTN_SE AS recptnSe , TO_CHAR(NR.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS frstRegisterPnttm
mapper.select: SELECT FROM TB_NOTE NOTE JOIN TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT ON NOTE.NOTE_ID = NT.NOTE_ID JOIN TB_NOTE_RECPTN NR ON NR.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = NT.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AND NR.NOTE_ID = NOTE.NOTE_ID WHERE NR.DELETE_AT = 'N' ORDER BY NR.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTE NOTE JOIN TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT ON NOTE.NOTE_ID = NT.NOTE_ID JOIN TB_NOTE_RECPTN NR ON NR.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = NT.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AND NR.NOTE_ID = NOTE.NOTE_ID WHERE NR.DELETE_AT = 'N'

SELECT FROM TB_NOTE NOTE JOIN TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT NT ON NOTE.NOTE_ID = NT.NOTE_ID JOIN TB_NOTE_RECPTN NR ON NR.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = NT.NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID AND NR.NOTE_ID = NOTE.NOTE_ID WHERE NR.NOTE_RECPTN_ID = #{noteRecptnId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTE_TRNSMIT WHERE NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId} AND DELETE_AT = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_NOTE_RECPTN WHERE NOTE_TRNSMIT_ID = #{noteTrnsmitId} AND DELETE_AT = 'N'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTE_RECPTN SET OPEN_YN = 'Y' , READNG_AT = 'Y' , LAST_UPDT_PNTTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE NOTE_RECPTN_ID = #{noteRecptnId}
